subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God and hath walked in the path of His good-pleasure. Upon him rest the mercy of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله و سلک فی سبیل الرضا علیه رحمه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
